fields.limit: Maximum Number of Records per Iteration
fields.exportByMaxDepth: Maximum depth of relations to show

labels.removeAllItemsConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove all configurator rules?
labels.allAttributesAlreadyAdded: All attributes item has been already added.

messages.confirmTemplateGeneration: Are you sure you want to generate Template?
messages.delimitersMustBeDifferent: All feed parameters should have unique values.
messages.columnAlreadyExist: A column with such name already exists.
messages.duplicateAsImport: Are you sure you want to create an import feed from this export feed ?

exceptions.toManyAttributesSelected: Maximum amount of selected attributes should be below 2000 records.
exceptions.exportValidationFailed: You can not export such file. Please, check the form and try again.
exceptions.lastRecordIsRequired: Last record in the configurator cannot be removed.
exceptions.noFieldLabel: Label for the field '%s' for the language '%s' ist not set.
exceptions.noAttributeLabel: Label for the attribute '%s' for the language '%s' ist not set.
exceptions.noConfiguratorItems: Please create at least one configurator rule to be able to execute this feed.
exceptions.noSheets: Please create at least one sheet to be able to execute this feed.
exceptions.exportFeedIsInvalid: Export feed contains errors. Please fix them before proceeding.

tooltips.maxWorkers: This determines how many workers can execute this feed in parallel.
tooltips.template: You can use the syntax for Twig template engine.
tooltips.convertCollectionToString: Fields and attributes of type: multi-enum, array, one-to-many relation.
tooltips.convertRelationsToString: Relation fields will be separated by Field Delimiter for Relation.
tooltips.markForNoRelation: Specify how a not linked relation should be labeled.
tooltips.nullValue: Value will be interpreted as "NULL" value.
tooltips.emptyValue: Value will be interpreted as "empty" value additionally to the empty cell.
tooltips.exportByMaxDepth: Specifies maximum depth of relations in the configurator field "Related Entity Fields"
tooltips.useQuoteForAll: All values in the exported file will be enclosed in quotation marks
tooltips.limit: A higher amount means fewer background jobs need to be executed.
tooltips.separateJob: The system will generate a separate export file for each export job.

boolFilters.onlyExportFailed24Hours: Only Export Feeds that failed during last 24 hours
boolFilters.onlyExportFailed7Days: Only Export Feeds that failed during last 7 days
boolFilters.onlyExportFailed28Days: Only Export Feeds that failed during last 28 days

fileNameMask.filename: Default filename generated by the system
